subcodes.first_line: O ye beloved of God and friends of the All-Merciful Beauty! From the sacred outpourings of the Ancient Beauty and the Most Great Name, my spirit [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای احبای الهی و دوستان جمال رحمانی از فیوضات مقدسه جمال قدم و اسم اعظم روحی و
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @unity; oneness of humanity, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @love of God
